title: T-007 — pick_overrides audit table (WH §5.7, §9.6)
prompt:
# T-007 — pick_overrides audit table (WH §5.7, §9.6)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §5.7, §9.6
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create `pick_overrides` audit log capturing every FEFO/FIFO deviation per Q6B pattern (operator must confirm warning + reason). KPI source for `override_rate` <5% target.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `0NN_pick_overrides.sql`: per §5.7 columns including `pick_request_id VARCHAR(64)`, `wo_id`, `to_line_id`, `suggested_lp_id`, `picked_lp_id`, `reason_code ENUM('batch_exhaustion','qa_release','physical_accessibility','line_priority','operator_decision','other')`, `reason_text`, `confirmed_by`, `confirmed_at`, `delta_days INT`.
2. CHECK `reason_code='other' IMPLIES reason_text IS NOT NULL AND length(reason_text) >= 10`.
3. Indexes: `(wo_id, confirmed_at DESC)`, `(confirmed_at)` for KPI rolling window queries.
4. RLS + tenant policy.
5. Drizzle schema.

## Files
- packages/db/src/schema/pick-overrides.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_pick_overrides.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/pick-overrides.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given an insert with `reason_code='other'` and empty `reason_text`, when attempted, then the CHECK rejects it.
2. Given an insert with `picked_lp_id = suggested_lp_id` (no real deviation), when committed, then it succeeds (override audit can log no-op confirmations).
3. Given RLS, when tenant B reads tenant A's overrides, then zero rows are returned.

## Test strategy
- RED: `packages/db/src/schema/pick-overrides.test.ts` asserting reason CHECK + RLS.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test pick-overrides`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow `reason_code='other'` without `reason_text` (V-WH-FEFO-002).
- Do not omit RLS.

## Dependencies
- T-002
